items.title: Dividend Income: Lanny's October 2025 Summary
items.description: In October, we (my wife and I) received a dividend income total of $3,948.78. Crushing it for an off-month â thanks to Vanguard (VOO) and Fidelity (FXAIX) for paying in October.

items.title: Kroger CEO flags alarming shift in how customers shop
items.description: People need to eat, but what they eat depends a lot on their budget. Executives from lower-priced chains, including McDonald's and Dollar General, have commented on how they are seeing sales growth with higher-income customers.
